# Dávid Kromka – Kromka IT

> Full-stack web developer based in Poprad, Slovakia. Specialising in modern web applications — from design to deployment. Available for freelance projects and collaborations.

## About

- Name: Dávid Kromka
- Website: https://kromka.it
- Contact: david@kromka.it
- Location: Poprad, Slovakia
- Education: Master's degree in Informatics, FIIT STU Bratislava (2025)

## Work Experience

- **SEN Systems** (2022 – present) — Full-stack developer building web and desktop applications for domestic and international clients using ASP.NET Core, Blazor, WinUI 3, and MS SQL.
- **Ministry of Investments, Regional Development and Informatisation of SR** (2023) — Web and mobile application accessibility tester (WCAG).
- **Algorithmics** (2022) — Python & Scratch programming instructor and SK/EN translator.

## Skills & Technologies

- **Backend:** ASP.NET Core, Blazor, WinUI 3, .NET, Python, Node.js
- **Database:** MS SQL Server, T-SQL, PostgreSQL
- **Frontend:** Vue.js, React, Quasar, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS/SCSS
- **Tools:** Bootstrap, DevExpress, jQuery, Git, Docker, Claude Code, WCAG Accessibility

## Projects

- [Track My Bunny](https://trackmybunny.kromka.it/) — Pet rabbit health management app (daily logs, weight tracking, medication scheduling, PDF export). Built with Next.js.
- [Predškoláčik](https://predskolacik.app/) — AI-powered educational app for preschool children (early literacy, counting, logical thinking).
- [Pexesolab](https://pexeso.predskolacik.app/) — AI-powered memory card game generator from custom images.
- [SQL Injection Lab](https://sqlinjectionlab.kromka.it/) — Safe and legal SQL Injection practice environment for students and security professionals.
- [Mirka & David](https://mirkaadavid.kromka.it/) — Custom wedding website with guest info, schedule, and photo sharing.
- [Toxipred](https://mltox.fiit.stuba.sk) — Machine learning tools for genotoxicity and phototoxicity prediction (research project, FIIT STU).

## Cooperations

- [SEN Systems](https://sensystems.sk) — Full-stack development (ASP.NET Core, Blazor, WinUI 3, MS SQL)
- [Latschbacher](https://www.latschbacher.com) — Austrian forestry ERP system (WinforstPro)
- [MIRRI](https://mirri.gov.sk) — Web & mobile WCAG accessibility testing
- [Algorithmics](https://slovakia.alg.academy/svk) — Python & Scratch instruction, SK/EN translation
